info.name: IFX APIs test
info.description:
IFX APIs provide a way for developers to manage integrations programatically. You will need Personal Access Tokens (PAT) from the Developer Center tile. The PAT can be obtained following the next steps:
  1. Login to Okta
  2. Go to Arc Administration
  3. Go to Developer Center
  4. Create Admin Token. This token can then be passed as the bearer token to the developer APIs for access.
